infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: StepTracker uses motion data to count your steps.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: StepTracker uses your location to track runs and walks.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: StepTracker uses background location to track runs even when the app is closed.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: StepTracker uses the camera to take profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: StepTracker accesses your photos for your profile picture.
